hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if command -v npx >/dev/null && [ -f package.json ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && command -v npx >/dev/null && [ -f package.json ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
